title: The Quiet Chamber
body: We stepped into the quiet enclosure, leaving the constant hum of the city behind.

title: Among the Silence
body: Two strangers in matching uniforms, each locked inside their own world.

title: A Distant Voice
body: A phone call echoed against the metal walls, breaking the heavy silence between us.

title: The Shared Glance
body: A sudden turn, a brief moment of curiosity where our eyes unexpectedly met.

title: A Fleeting Smile
body: The cold tension of the morning rush dissolved into a soft, quiet smile.

title: A Memory Written
body: No words were spoken, yet that simple glance remains forever etched in time: 04.07.25.
